compiled_state.title: f9d9-343d: Task A — Write RED structural tests for scope-drift-reviewer agent
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Story
f9d9-343d — Create scope-drift-reviewer agent definition

## testing_mode
RED

## Objective
Write a failing structural test suite that defines the required shape of the scope-drift-reviewer agent definition. These tests must be RED (failing) when created because the agent file does not exist yet.

## File to Create
tests/scripts/test-scope-drift-reviewer.sh

## Test Sections (6 required)
1. **parsed_scope_checkpoint** — grep for 'PARSED_SCOPE' block in agent file; assert it exists AND contains the constraint 'Do NOT read root_cause_report before PARSED_SCOPE block is complete'
2. **gate_signal_format** — grep for all 5 required GATE_SIGNAL fields (gate_id, triggered, signal_type, evidence, confidence); also assert 'drift_classification' is documented as optional extension field
3. **drift_classification_values** — grep for the three enumerated drift_classification values: 'in_scope', 'ambiguous', 'out_of_scope'
4. **scope_insufficient_halt** — grep for 'scope_insufficient' guard behavior; assert 'STOP' or 'halt' instruction is present
5. **heuristic_table_structure** — grep for behavioral vs non-behavioral heuristic table with at least 3 examples in each column
6. **consumers_table_updated** — grep gate-signal-schema.md consumers table for 'scope_drift' row (forward-reference; will fail until Task C runs)

## .test-index Entry (add ONE entry)
plugins/dso/agents/scope-drift-reviewer.md: tests/scripts/test-scope-drift-reviewer.sh [test_scope_drift_reviewer_parsed_scope]

Note: ONE entry per source→test mapping. The [test_scope_drift_reviewer_parsed_scope] marker blocks epic closure until the agent file exists and tests pass GREEN.

## Acceptance Criteria
- tests/scripts/test-scope-drift-reviewer.sh exists and is executable
- Running the test suite produces failures (RED state confirmed)
- .test-index contains exactly the one entry above
- plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci passes (test gate records RED status; RED is acceptable pre-implementation)
